name: 28 Initiatives
templateInstructions:
[auto_div_header] Edit only these text nodes:
    .pi-badge -> value of ACTIVE PI field, for example PI 28
    .header-title -> value of Roadmap Initiative field verbatim
    .header-subtitle -> value of Roadmap Initiative Group field
    .header-stat-value (1st) -> Total Effort formatted with comma
    .header-stat-value (2nd) -> Feature Count as integer
    .header-stat-value (3rd) -> Main Requester value, for example GRC

[auto_div_strategic] Populate at least 1 and at most 3 reason blocks.
      Each reason has .reason-num, .reason-title, and .reason-text.
      Separate each reason with a .reason-rule divider.
      Do not change the Strategic Case label.
      Do not add anye other elements to the strategic panel.

[div] Keep the Features section title and filter chips unchanged.

[div] Keep the Features section title and filter chips unchanged.

[auto_json_features] Replace all entries in the featureDataSource JSON array.
          Do not change field count or order.
          Each entry has exactly 10 fields:
          [0] IRM id
          [1] effort string without h suffix and with comma for 1000+
          [2] feature name
          [3] one-sentence description
          [4] status dot color hex
          [5] status text color hex
          [6] status label
          [7] badge CSS class: req-grc, req-gtm, or req-other
          [8] badge text: GRC, GTM, or Other
          [9] bar percentage 0-100
          Use only the fields already present in the template.
          Dont break the structure of the template
          Output at most 10 feature-cards. If there are more than 10, keep only the 10 with the highest effort value.

selections.exampleHtml:
PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
Maintainability Enhancements
Technology Upgrades
4,365
Total Hours
15
Features
GRC
Main Requester

Strategic Case
01
Tech Debt Reduction
Restructures revenue-management-be-custom to hexagonal architecture, improving maintainability and reducing long-term technical debt across all delivery teams.
02
Critical Platform Upgrades
Implements Java 25, Spring Boot 4.x, and Oracle 26ai to keep the platform secure, supported, and performant for current and future jurisdictions.
03
Configuration Management
Introduces a dedicated Config Items Management tool for safely packaging and migrating configurations across environments without manual risk.
Features
Filter
IRM-410161,200h
Hexagonal Architecture Refactor
Restructure revenue-management-be-custom to clean hexagonal architecture with improved separation of concerns, enhanced testability, and reduced coupling.
In Design
GRC
IRM-41015640h
Java 25 Upgrade
Migrate codebase to Java 25 to leverage virtual threads, pattern matching, and significant performance improvements for high-volume tax operations.
In Progress
GTM
IRM-40177480h
Spring Boot 4.x Migration
Upgrade to Spring Boot 4.x with enhanced observability, native compilation support, improved dependency management, and critical security patches.
To Do
Other
IRM-40176420h
Oracle 26ai Database Migration
Migrate to Oracle 26ai to harness AI-powered query optimisation, advanced analytics, and improved performance for high-volume tax transaction processing.
To Do
Other
IRM-40174380h
Config Items Management Tool
Dedicated tool for safely packaging, versioning, and migrating configurations across development, staging, and production without manual intervention.
In Design
GRC
IRM-40175220h
Cross-Team UI Tech Debt
Systematic UI improvements and technical debt reduction spanning ATH, EOS, SPA, HEL, and DAID teams for long-term platform sustainability.
In Progress
GTM
IRM-40178180h
Dependency Management Audit
Systematic review and upgrade of all third-party dependencies to eliminate CVEs, reduce supply chain risk, and enforce version policy across all modules.
To Do
GRC
IRM-40179140h
Observability & Distributed Tracing
Instrument all services with OpenTelemetry, configure Jaeger trace collection, and add structured logging for correlated request tracking across microservices.
In Design
GTM
IRM-40180110h
ArchUnit Governance Rules
Define and enforce ArchUnit rules to validate layered architecture boundaries, prevent circular dependencies, and ensure naming conventions across all modules.
In Progress
Other
IRM-4018190h
Test Coverage Uplift
Increase unit and integration test coverage to 80% threshold across all critical revenue calculation modules, with automated gate enforcement in CI pipeline.
To Do
GRC
IRM-4018270h
API Versioning Strategy
Establish a consistent API versioning strategy with deprecation policies, migration guides, and automated compatibility checks to protect downstream consumers.
In Design
GTM
IRM-4018365h
CI/CD Pipeline Hardening
Enforce branch protection, mandatory code review gates, and automated quality checks across all repositories to prevent regressions reaching production.
To Do
GRC
IRM-4018455h
Secret Management Integration
Migrate all hardcoded credentials and config secrets to HashiCorp Vault with automatic rotation policies and audit logging for compliance.
In Design
GRC
IRM-4018545h
Database Migration Tooling
Adopt Flyway for versioned, repeatable database schema migrations across all environments with rollback support and CI integration.
In Progress
GTM
IRM-4018635h
Developer Portal & Docs
Publish a centralised developer portal with API references, architecture diagrams, onboarding guides, and runbooks for all platform services.
To Do
Other
No features match the selected filters.

IRM-40178180h
Dependency Management Audit
Systematic review and upgrade of all third-party dependencies to eliminate CVEs, reduce supply chain risk, and enforce version policy across all modules.
To Do
GRC
IRM-40179140h
Observability & Distributed Tracing
Instrument all services with OpenTelemetry, configure Jaeger trace collection, and add structured logging for correlated request tracking across microservices.
In Design
GTM
IRM-40180110h
ArchUnit Governance Rules
Define and enforce ArchUnit rules to validate layered architecture boundaries, prevent circular dependencies, and ensure naming conventions across all modules.
In Progress
Other
IRM-4018190h
Test Coverage Uplift
Increase unit and integration test coverage to 80% threshold across all critical revenue calculation modules, with automated gate enforcement in CI pipeline.
To Do
GRC
IRM-4018270h
API Versioning Strategy
Establish a consistent API versioning strategy with deprecation policies, migration guides, and automated compatibility checks to protect downstream consumers.
In Design
GTM
IRM-4018365h
CI/CD Pipeline Hardening
Enforce branch protection, mandatory code review gates, and automated quality checks across all repositories to prevent regressions reaching production.
To Do
GRC
IRM-4018455h
Secret Management Integration
Migrate all hardcoded credentials and config secrets to HashiCorp Vault with automatic rotation policies and audit logging for compliance.
In Design
GRC
IRM-4018545h
Database Migration Tooling
Adopt Flyway for versioned, repeatable database schema migrations across all environments with rollback support and CI integration.
In Progress
GTM
IRM-4018635h
Developer Portal & Docs
Publish a centralised developer portal with API references, architecture diagrams, onboarding guides, and runbooks for all platform services.
To Do

Strategic Case
01
Tech Debt Reduction
Restructures revenue-management-be-custom to hexagonal architecture, improving maintainability and reducing long-term technical debt across all delivery teams.
02
Critical Platform Upgrades
Implements Java 25, Spring Boot 4.x, and Oracle 26ai to keep the platform secure, supported, and performant for current and future jurisdictions.
03
Configuration Management
Introduces a dedicated Config Items Management tool for safely packaging and migrating configurations across environments without manual risk.

01

Provide visibility into calculated effort for each assigned case worker and total case effort, with automatic recalculation when case dates, allocations, or resource calendars change.
